setup.commandDescription: Manage Spam Catcher for this server
setup.setupDescription: Open the Spam Catcher setup panel
setup.langDescription: Set the Spam Catcher interface language
setup.languageOptionDescription: Language to use for Spam Catcher UI in this server
setup.runInGuild: Run this command inside a Discord server.
setup.adminOnly: Only users with Administrator permission can configure Spam Catcher.
setup.banImmediateOutcome: Ban immediately. No timeout or appeal window.
setup.banAfterTimeoutOutcome: Timeout for {timeout}, then ban when timeout ends.
setup.banDelayedOutcome: Timeout for {timeout}, then ban after {delay} appeal window.
setup.postNoticesReady: Ready to post or refresh warning notices.
setup.postNoticesNotReady: Set trap, review, and log channels before posting notices.
setup.independentDetection: Independent from main Spam Catcher enabled state.
setup.autoBanEnabled: Auto Ban enabled. Choose ban timing below.
setup.autoBanDisabled: Auto Ban disabled. Users will be timed out only.
setup.cannotEnableSpam: Cannot enable yet: set trap, review, and log channels first.
setup.cannotEnableDetection: Cannot enable yet: set log channel first.
setup.noticesFailed: Post/update notices failed. Check bot logs.
setup.noticesFinishedWithFailures: Post/update notices finished: {success}/{total} succeeded, {failed} failed. Check bot logs.

notice.title: # Do Not Send Messages in This Channel
notice.warning: This channel is made to catch spammers. If you send a message in this channel, {action} {appeal}
notice.dareBody: Even if you are just testing, the system will still catch you.
notice.banAfterTimeoutAction: you will receive a `timeout` for {timeout}, then be `banned` when the timeout ends.
notice.banDelayedAction: you will receive a `timeout` for {timeout}, then be `banned` after a {delay} appeal window.
notice.appealDefault: If you are timed out, please send a private message to one of the online admins or use the appeal button if available.
notice.appealImmediate: If this was a mistake, please contact a server admin.

moderation.appealSavedNoReview: Your appeal was saved, but the review channel is not available. Please contact an admin.
moderation.appealSavedNoMessage: Your appeal was saved, but the review message could not be sent. Please contact an admin.
moderation.appealSent: Your appeal was sent to the admins.
moderation.timeoutDm:
You have been timed out in {guild} because you posted in a spam catcher channel.
If this was a mistake, click the button below and explain what happened.
moderation.alreadyTimedOutDm:
You posted in a spam catcher channel in {guild} while already timed out.
If this was a mistake, click the button below and explain what happened.
moderation.timeoutDmReasonSpamCatcher: A message from your account was posted in a Spam Catcher trap channel in {guild}.
moderation.timeoutDmReasonAutomatic: Messages from your account matched Automatic Spam Detection in {guild}.
moderation.timeoutDmReasonAlreadyActive: Your account triggered Spam Catcher again in {guild} while already timed out.
moderation.timeoutDmNextBody: If this was a mistake, use the appeal button and explain what happened. Admins will review your message.
moderation.timeoutDmFooter: Do not repeat the same action while appeal is pending.
moderation.banDm: You are being banned by Spam Catcher. If this was a mistake, please contact a server admin.
moderation.timeoutRemovedDm:
Your timeout in {guild} has been lifted by the admins.
You can send messages again.

automatic.reasonCrossChannel: Same user sent 2 or more attachments in multiple channels within the active 10-minute window.
automatic.reasonRepeated: Same user sent 2 or more attachments more than once within the active 10-minute window.
automatic.statusUserUnavailable: User was no longer available when handled by <@{userId}>.
automatic.adminHint: Review evidence, then remove timeout if false positive or ban if confirmed spam.
